'''vachada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetonotid|chaetonotid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetonotid|chaetonotid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vachada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væchædæth|væchædæth]] || [[word:væchædæj|væchædæj]] || [[word:væchædæsh|væchædæsh]] || [[word:væchædæ|væchædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachachadath|vachachadath]] || [[word:vachachadaj|vachachadaj]] || [[word:vachachadash|vachachadash]] || [[word:vachachada|vachachada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachadath|vachadath]] || [[word:vachadaj|vachadaj]] || [[word:vachadash|vachadash]] || [[word:vachada|vachada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachafdath|vachafdath]] || [[word:vachafdaj|vachafdaj]] || [[word:vachafdash|vachafdash]] || [[word:vachafdaf|vachafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vachadatha|vachadatha]] || [[word:vachadaja|vachadaja]] || [[word:vachadasha|vachadasha]] || [[word:vachadaka|vachadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vachadath|vachadath]] || [[word:vachadaj|vachadaj]] || [[word:vachadash|vachadash]] || [[word:vachada|vachada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vachadathal|vachadathal]] || [[word:vachadajal|vachadajal]] || [[word:vachadashal|vachadashal]] || [[word:vachadakal|vachadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vachadathatha|vachadathatha]] || [[word:vachadajaja|vachadajaja]] || [[word:vachadashasha|vachadashasha]] || [[word:vachadaka|vachadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vachadathan|vachadathan]] || [[word:vachadajan|vachadajan]] || [[word:vachadashan|vachadashan]] || [[word:vachadakan|vachadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vachadathaoro|vachadathaoro]] || [[word:vachadajaoro|vachadajaoro]] || [[word:vachadashaoro|vachadashaoro]] || [[word:vachadakaoro|vachadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
